SEARCH
Package neqsim.mcp.runners

Class HazopScenarioRunner

java.lang.Object
neqsim.mcp.runners.HazopScenarioRunner
public final class HazopScenarioRunner extends Object
MCP runner for quantifying a single HAZOP deviation against a NeqSim process simulation.

Where HAZOPStudyRunner generates a whole worksheet, this runner answers the focused question an interactive P&ID Safety Analyser / HAZOP tool asks: "for this node and this guide-word/parameter deviation, what does the simulation say the consequence is?" It builds and runs the supplied ProcessSystem, calls HazopConsequenceAutoPopulator.quantify(neqsim.process.processmodel.ProcessSystem, neqsim.process.safety.hazid.HazopQuantificationLimits), then filters the findings to the requested node and deviation, returning the quantified consequence with its design limit, verdict, governing standard and the auditable basis for the limit.

Input JSON shape: 

 {
   "process": { ... ProcessSystem JSON ... },
   "nodeTag": "K-100",            // optional unit name or node-id fragment filter
   "guideWord": "MORE",           // optional HAZOP guide word filter
   "parameter": "TEMPERATURE",    // optional process parameter filter
   "limits": {                     // optional design-limit policy
     "maxDischargeTemperatureC": 150.0,
     "minDesignMetalTemperatureC": -46.0,
     "maxDischargeTemperatureByUnit": { "K-100": 170.0 },
     "minDesignMetalTemperatureByUnit": { "V-100": -50.0 }
   }
 }
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • HazopScenarioRunner

      private HazopScenarioRunner()
      Private constructor for utility class.

  • Method Details

    • run

      public static String run(String json)
      Quantify a HAZOP deviation from JSON input.
      Parameters:
      json - JSON containing a process definition and optional node/deviation filters and design limits
      Returns:
      JSON string with the matching quantified findings, or an error object

    • toMap

      private static Map<String,Object> toMap(HazopConsequenceFinding finding)
      Convert a finding to an insertion-ordered map for stable JSON serialisation.
      Parameters:
      finding - the finding to convert
      Returns:
      a map of the finding fields

    • matchesNode

      private static boolean matchesNode(HazopConsequenceFinding finding, String nodeTag)
      Test whether a finding matches the requested node filter, comparing both the unit name and the node-id fragment.
      Parameters:
      finding - the finding to test
      nodeTag - the requested node filter, or null/empty to match any node
      Returns:
      true if the finding matches the node filter

    • matchesEnum

      private static boolean matchesEnum(String actual, String requested)
      Test whether an enum constant name matches a requested filter, case-insensitively.
      Parameters:
      actual - the enum constant name from the finding
      requested - the requested filter, or null/empty to match any value
      Returns:
      true if the value matches the filter

    • parseLimits

      private static HazopQuantificationLimits parseLimits(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Parse the optional design-limit policy from the input JSON.
      Parameters:
      input - the input JSON object
      Returns:
      a populated limits holder (defaults when no policy is supplied)

    • applyOverrides

      private static void applyOverrides(com.google.gson.JsonObject node, String key, HazopQuantificationLimits limits, boolean isDischarge)
      Apply a map of per-unit limit overrides to the limits holder.
      Parameters:
      node - the limits JSON object
      key - the override-map key to read
      limits - the limits holder to update
      isDischarge - true to set maximum discharge temperature overrides, false for MDMT overrides

    • extractProcessJson

      private static String extractProcessJson(com.google.gson.JsonObject input)
      Extract the process-definition JSON from the input, accepting either a "process" property or a bare process definition.
      Parameters:
      input - the input JSON object
      Returns:
      the process-definition JSON string

    • optString

      private static String optString(com.google.gson.JsonObject obj, String key, String fallback)
      Read an optional string property from a JSON object.
      Parameters:
      obj - the JSON object
      key - the property name
      fallback - the value to return when the property is missing or not a primitive
      Returns:
      the string value, or fallback

    • errorJson

      private static String errorJson(String message)
      Build a standard error response.
      Parameters:
      message - the error message
      Returns:
      a JSON error object
